ideation: This sequence depicts the robot covering its own ears to indicate muting or silencing. It uses a combination of arm movements to create a natural-looking gesture. The sequence will begin with the arms at rest, then transition to the hands covering the ears, and finally return to a relaxed state. This mimics the action of physically muting sound. Each frame represents a distinct position in the overall gesture and will emphasize the intention behind the emoji. The robot lacks fingers, so the effect will be suggestive rather than literal.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to silence
arms sweep up to cover the ears firmly
pressing in to block out all sound
arms release, the world is quiet now
